::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\AddToShipoutPictureBG*{\AtPageUpperLeft{\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth,height=\paperheight]{images/ch4_cover.jpg}}}
\null
\newpage
\pagecolor{thesissand}
:::

# Structure over Material {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\vspace{1cm}
\begin{center}
Olivier V. Raven, Robin Holmes, Ian A. K. Kusabs,\\
Francis J. Burdon \& Deniz Özkundakci\\[0.6cm]
\textit{Aquatic Conservation: Marine and Freshwater Ecosystems} --- Under review
\end{center}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
![](../images/ch4_cover.jpg){fig-align="center" width=15cm}

Olivier V. Raven, Robin Holmes, Ian A. K. Kusabs, Francis J. Burdon & Deniz Özkundakci

*Aquatic Conservation: Marine and Freshwater Ecosystems* — Under review
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\afterpage{\pagecolor{thesiscream}}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}
